rule.description: Delete intent detected: path=$(win.eventdata.objectName), user=$(win.eventdata.subjectUserName), domain=$(win.eventdata.subjectDomainName), process=$(win.eventdata.processName).
File deletion detected: path=$(win.eventdata.objectName), user=$(win.eventdata.subjectUserName), domain=$(win.eventdata.subjectDomainName), process=$(win.eventdata.processName).
Permissions changed on object: path=$(win.eventdata.objectName), user=$(win.eventdata.subjectUserName), domain=$(win.eventdata.subjectDomainName), process=$(win.eventdata.processName).
Repeated delete intent detected from the same user: user=$(win.eventdata.subjectUserName).
Bulk file deletion detected from the same user: user=$(win.eventdata.subjectUserName).
Multiple permission changes detected from the same user: user=$(win.eventdata.subjectUserName).

Network share file access detected: user=$(win.eventdata.subjectUserName), domain=$(win.eventdata.subjectDomainName), source_ip=$(win.eventdata.ipAddress), share=$(win.eventdata.shareName), target=$(win.eventdata.relativeTargetName).
Possible file copy from a network share: repeated file access events from the same user. User=$(win.eventdata.subjectUserName), source_ip=$(win.eventdata.ipAddress), share=$(win.eventdata.shareName).

Likely bulk file copy from a network share: high-volume file access events from the same user. User=$(win.eventdata.subjectUserName), source_ip=$(win.eventdata.ipAddress), share=$(win.eventdata.shareName).
